statement: In every magma, Equation 2800 (`x = ((y * z) * (y * w)) * y`) implies Equation 866 (`x = x * ((y * z) * (w * z))`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0657
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op (op y z) (op y w)) y)) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op x (op (op y z) (op w z)))
